'''Comkin V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==Description==
It exported candies and medicines.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The planet had blue [[Ocean/Legends|seas]], deep green tropics, and small patches of arctic ice.

{{Planet-stub}}

==History==
It once had economic ties with [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

During the early days of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Comkin V was controlled by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> It was the site of a [[Raid on Comkin V|battle]] during the [[Hunt for Zsinj|Zsinj campaign]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
